posts.title: Federal Judge Tosses Ray Epps’ Defamation Suit Against Fox News, concluding that his allegations failed to plausibly establish “actual malice.”

link_metadata.description: A federal judge has once again thrown out the defamation lawsuit filed by James Ray Epps Sr. against Fox News, delivering another major courtroom victory for the network and reaffirming the high legal bar public figures face when attempting to sue media organizations over political commentary.
